title: Everything Shes Ever Dreamed
wikitext:
[]: Everything She's Ever Dreamed             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 29, 2005 3:48 pm A little bit of fun for over the weekend... (500th post! Yay!) If Third Impact and the JSSDF invasion had never happened, with Kaji dead, Shinji still free-falling into his own void - who would be Asuka's Prince Charming then? Not that there's a wide field to choose from if you stick to named male characters within the series (poor Asuka-chan :cry: ), so "someone like <character from elsewhere>" might be necessary.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jul 29, 2005 4:05 pm If 3I never hit, theirs always a chance that Shinji would pull himself together, or maybe Misato would get her act together and do somthing for those kids. I know the last one wasn't what you were looking for, but I think it Misato would have come around before Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Sat Jul 30, 2005 12:43 am Gendo of course! If she can't have Shinji, she can work up the family tree. On second thought, I think she might have a thing for really older men and Fuyutski would be there to provide.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sun Jul 31, 2005 7:44 am I think most of you already know what I'm going to say regarding this topic... But really, it's a good question. We've had this discussion from Shinji's POV countless of times already, but not really from Asuka's. From a Shinji POV, we have several choices, depending on your views of incest. But from Asuka's POV, there aren't really many alternatives. Say, if she would meet some random guy from the street and they'd fall in love. Would she be able to open up and tell him about her problems (which I find very unlikely)? "Honey, I haven't really told you this, but my mother went insane and committed suicide when I were young, and since then I havn't really been myself. I started to push people away as a type of defensive mechanism, but underneath the thick shell I'm just a lonely and insecure little girl. You don't mind this, do you?" And most importantly, what would the guy do once he learned that she wasn't what he thought she would be? We already know about Shinji's reaction, though. "I want to help you in some way... And be with you forever." Also, we are forgetting her attitude . How many guys would be able to put up with her? Tines, remember that Shinji's "free-fall into his own void," as you put it, was casued not only by Kaworu and Rei, but by Asuka's attempted suicide as well. Her "awakening" might be able to help Shinji put his feet back on solid ground once again. If Asuka would still be in a suicidial state when she wakes up again, though, even our Muteki na Shinji-sama may not be able to help her. And Steve, the name and concept of this thread kinda reminds me of a thread over at AN that was named "Everything He's Ever Dreamed." Funny coincidence, ne?

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Sun Jul 31, 2005 7:56 am If she has a thing for men in their late 20's or something, I and Ryo could come over to Japan and seduce her? We'd be 26 and 29 I believe? I'm just frigging tired... I don't want to press the submit button, but I will... argh...

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Aug 01, 2005 4:48 am Ryo wrote: Also, we are forgetting her attitude . How many guys would be able to put up with her?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Aug 01, 2005 8:56 am OK, so Asuka's Prince Charming is Titus. Now, too bad that she doesn't exist in reality... :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 01, 2005 9:08 am Ryo wrote: OK, so Asuka's Prince Charming is Titus. Now, too bad that she doesn't exist in reality... :P

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 01, 2005 9:16 am Reichu wrote: Ryo wrote: OK, so Asuka's Prince Charming is Titus. Now, too bad that she doesn't exist in reality... :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 01, 2005 9:26 am DatDude wrote: How do you know about sex doll makers?

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Aug 01, 2005 9:34 am But dolls aren't the real thing. I mean, imagine if they started to breed Asuka clones... *drools*

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 01, 2005 9:46 am Ryo wrote: But dolls aren't the real thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Aug 01, 2005 10:14 am Well, you're right, I guess. But it would still be more real than dolls. Not that I'd want one, though.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Mon Aug 01, 2005 10:20 am Arguably, those wouldn't be the "real thing" either. Just because it looks like Asuka doesn't mean it IS Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Mon Aug 01, 2005 1:13 pm Well, I wouldn't mind, but I'm not paying for it.... :roll: Besides, I can have more fun with an Asuka doll than with the anime... :roll: Are u with me? Yay or nay?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Aug 01, 2005 1:21 pm Titus wrote: Well, I wouldn't mind, but I'm not paying for it.... :roll: Besides, I can have more fun with an Asuka doll than with the anime... :roll: Are u with me? Yay or nay?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 01, 2005 3:11 pm dont believe the crap thats coming from the movie, "the island" i've talked with one of the leading researchers in cloning and stem cell research, and he is pretty damn sure that human clones are (if possible) a really long way off even then, they wont even look exactly like you, and there is an enormous fail rate (something like a good 90% or above in MICE)
